'''âf-v-z''' ('''favaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neotypify|neotypify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neotypify|neotypify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-v-z
|-
! Lemma
| favaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:favazithi|favazithi]] || [[word:favaziji|favaziji]] || [[word:favazishi|favazishi]] || [[word:favazi|favazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:favazuthuth|favazuthuth]] || [[word:favazujuj|favazujuj]] || [[word:favazushush|favazushush]] || [[word:favaz|favaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:favazuthu|favazuthu]] || [[word:favazuju|favazuju]] || [[word:favazushu|favazushu]] || [[word:favazu|favazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:favazufuth|favazufuth]] || [[word:favazufuj|favazufuj]] || [[word:favazufush|favazufush]] || [[word:favazuf|favazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:favazethe|favazethe]] || [[word:favazeje|favazeje]] || [[word:favazeshe|favazeshe]] || [[word:favaze|favaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:favazothoth|favazothoth]] || [[word:favazojoj|favazojoj]] || [[word:favazoshosh|favazoshosh]] || [[word:favaz|favaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:favazotho|favazotho]] || [[word:favazojo|favazojo]] || [[word:favazosho|favazosho]] || [[word:favazo|favazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:favazofoth|favazofoth]] || [[word:favazofoj|favazofoj]] || [[word:favazofosh|favazofosh]] || [[word:favazof|favazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:favazĂŠthĂŠ|favazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:favazĂŠjĂŠ|favazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:favazĂŠshĂŠ|favazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:favazĂŠ|favazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:favazathath|favazathath]] || [[word:favazajaj|favazajaj]] || [[word:favazashash|favazashash]] || [[word:favaz|favaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:favazatha|favazatha]] || [[word:favazaja|favazaja]] || [[word:favazasha|favazasha]] || [[word:favaza|favaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:favazafath|favazafath]] || [[word:favazafaj|favazafaj]] || [[word:favazafash|favazafash]] || [[word:favazaf|favazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:favazasha|favazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofavazasha|gofavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifavazasha|gokifavazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:favaznĂŒsha|favaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofavaznknĂŒsha|gofavaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifavaznĂŒsha|gokifavaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:favazshĂ«sha|favazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofavaznkshĂ«sha|gofavaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifavazshĂ«sha|gokifavazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:favazrosha|favazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavaznkrosha|gofavaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavazrosha|gokifavazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:favazmusha|favazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavaznkmusha|gofavaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavazmusha|gokifavazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:favazsherasha|favazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofavaznksherasha|gofavaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifavazsherasha|gokifavazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:favazngasha|favazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofavaznkngasha|gofavaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifavazngasha|gokifavazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:favazyasha|favazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofavaznkyasha|gofavaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifavazyasha|gokifavazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:favazyamasha|favazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofavaznkyamasha|gofavaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifavazyamasha|gokifavazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:favaznĂŒshĂ«sha|favaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofavaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofavaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifavaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifavaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:favaznĂŒrosha|favaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavaznknĂŒrosha|gofavaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavaznĂŒrosha|gokifavaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favaznĂŒmusha|favaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavaznknĂŒmusha|gofavaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavaznĂŒmusha|gokifavaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:favazshĂ«nĂŒsha|favazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofavaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofavaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifavazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifavazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:favazshĂ«rosha|favazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavaznkshĂ«rosha|gofavaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavazshĂ«rosha|gokifavazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favazshĂ«musha|favazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavaznkshĂ«musha|gofavaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavazshĂ«musha|gokifavazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:favazronĂŒsha|favazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofavaznkronĂŒsha|gofavaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifavazronĂŒsha|gokifavazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:favazroshĂ«sha|favazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofavaznkroshĂ«sha|gofavaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifavazroshĂ«sha|gokifavazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:favazromusha|favazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofavaznkromusha|gofavaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifavazromusha|gokifavazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:favazmunĂŒsha|favazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofavaznkmunĂŒsha|gofavaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifavazmunĂŒsha|gokifavazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:favazmushĂ«sha|favazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofavaznkmushĂ«sha|gofavaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifavazmushĂ«sha|gokifavazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:favazmurosha|favazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofavaznkmurosha|gofavaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifavazmurosha|gokifavazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:favaz|favaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠvĂŠz|fĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofavaz|hofavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠvĂŠz|hofĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofavaz|hohofavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠvĂŠz|hohofĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfavaz|nĂŒfavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŒfĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfavaz|nĂŒnĂŒfavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfavaz|nĂŻfavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŻfĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfavaz|nĂŻnĂŻfavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠvĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufavaz|lufavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠvĂŠz|lufĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufavaz|lulufavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠvĂŠz|lulufĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifavaz|lifavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠvĂŠz|lifĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifavaz|lilifavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠvĂŠz|lilifĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofavaz|kofavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠvĂŠz|kofĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofavaz|kokofavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠvĂŠz|kokofĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefavaz|kefavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠvĂŠz|kefĂŠvĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefavaz|kekefavaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠvĂŠz|kekefĂŠvĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
